caption: A news broadcast focuses on the politics of Bihar, featuring a graphic layout with several portraits of politicians. A central figure in a white kurta stands in a spotlight beneath the text "बिहार की राजनीति". To the left, a portrait is labeled "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", and to the right, portraits are labeled "मंत्री डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी". Various text boxes indicate political terms, such as "उप 72 वर्ष 9वीं बार CM" and "उप 34 वर्ष पूर्व डिप्टी CM". The top red banner reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है", while the bottom ticker displays "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". As the sequence progresses, the portraits on the left change to include "डिप्टी CM सम्राट चौधरी" and "विजय सिन्हा". A "MAHAHOW" logo and a timestamp of "10:02 PM" are visible in the bottom right corner.
